backgroundImageSettings.questionTitle: Your mission: Examine the email closely and click on all the red flags that suggest it may be a phishing attempt.

userSettings.feedbackText: Suspicious Sender 🕵️ Nice catch! Always verify email addresses, phishers often spoof or slightly alter legit senders to trick you.
Grammatical Errors ✍️ Sharp eye! Spelling and grammar mistakes are classic phishing red flags. Legit orgs review their comms.
Grammatical Errors ✍️ Sharp eye! Spelling and grammar mistakes are classic phishing red flags. Legit orgs review their comms.

Tempting Offers (e.g., “You’ve won!”, “Free gift”) 🎁 & Grammatical Errors ✍️ Sharp catch! If it sounds too good to be true, it probably is. Scammers use flashy offers to lure clicks. Also, spelling and grammar mistakes are classic phishing red flags.
Link Prompt 🔗 & Grammatical Errors✍️! Hovering over links reveals where they really go. If it feels off, don’t click. Also, spelling and grammar mistakes are classic phishing red flags

hotspotSettings.taskDescription: Your mission: Examine the email closely and click on all the red flags that suggest it may be a phishing attempt.  Look out for things like suspicious senders, urgent demands, strange links, or too-good-to-be-true offers.
hotspotSettings.noneSelectedFeedback: 🤔 Not quite. That section looks normal. Look for urgent language, suspicious links, or unusual sender details.
hotspotSettings.alreadySelectedFeedback: You already flagged this one, great eye! Look for other phish flags.
